englishDefinitions: incorporated it into his act, performance, or personal style
persianTranslation: آن را در صحنه/اجرای خودش جا داد
آن را وارد سبک اجرای خودش کرد
examples: He rolled it into his scene and made the joke work.
The comedian rolled it into his scene naturally.
She rolled the new idea into her scene without breaking the flow.
